title: Prasuti & Stri Roga Case Proforma
subtitle: NCISM — Obstetrics & Gynaecology (Prasuti Tantra / Stri Roga)

fields.content: 🌿 Artava (menstrual blood) is considered the primary Dushya in Stri Roga. Normal Artava: Indragopasamvarna (red like Indragopa insect), Snigdha (non-sticky), Gambhira (deep odour), Agandha (non-foul), lasts 3–5 days, appears every 28–30 days. Document all deviations.

fields.label: Age at menarche (Pratham Rutukala)
fields.hint: Menarche <10 = precocious puberty. >16 = primary amenorrhoea — investigate

fields.label: Cycle regularity
fields.hint: Oligomenorrhoea + weight gain + acne = suspect PCOS (Sthoulya + Artava Kshaya)

fields.label: Duration of flow
fields.hint: Flow >7 days = Asrigdhara (Menorrhagia). <2 days = Kshina Artava (scanty)

fields.label: Flow amount (Artava Pramana)
options: Flooding with clots (Udara Roga or fibroid)

fields.label: Dysmenorrhoea (Kashtartava)
options: Mild — no activity restriction (normal Vataja colicky)
fields.hint: Severe dysmenorrhoea + dyschezia: suspect Endometriosis (Udavarta) — USG pelvis

fields.label: Inter-menstrual / post-coital bleeding
fields.hint: Post-menopausal bleeding: endometrial carcinoma until proven otherwise — urgent TVS+biopsy

fields.content: 🌿 Masanumasika Pathya (month-wise Garbhini care) is a unique Ayurveda protocol. Month 1: Kshira (milk). Month 2: Kshira + Madhura Dravya. Month 3: Kshira + Shadanga Paniya + Honey + Ghrita. Months 4–6: increasing Brimhana. Months 7–9: Basti (Anuvasana), Picchu (vaginal tampon).

fields.label: Gestational age (if pregnant)
fields.hint: EDD = LMP + 9 months + 7 days (Naegele's). Confirm with USG in 1st trimester

fields.label: ANC visits completed
fields.hint: WHO recommendation: ≥8 ANC contacts. GoI minimum: 4 visits (1st trimester, 14-26w, 28-34w, 36w+)

fields.label: Current Garbhini month (for Ayurveda care)
options: Month 9 — Preparations for delivery, Niruha Basti

fields.label: Previous pregnancy complications / notes
fields.placeholder: LSCS indication + scar thickness, PPH history, pre-eclampsia, GDM, IUGR, stillbirth, neonatal death…

fields.label: Vaginal discharge (Pradar / Shweta Pradar)
options: Shweta Pradar (white, Kaphaja — physiological or chronic)
fields.hint: Curdy white = Candida (Kaphaja). Thin grey/fishy = BV (Vataja). Yellow-green = Trichomoniasis

fields.label: Pruritus vulvae (Kandu)
fields.hint: Severe pruritus + recurrent Candida: always screen for Diabetes (Madhumeha)

fields.label: Uterine size (bimanual)
fields.hint: Bulky tender uterus + heavy periods = Adenomyosis (Garbhashaya Roga)

fields.label: Tenderness on examination
fields.hint: CMT + fever + vaginal discharge = PID (Pittaja Yoni Vyapad) — start antibiotics immediately

fields.label: Artava nature (Ayurveda)
options: Sama Artava (normal — colour, quantity, timing all normal)
Vataja Artava (thin, black, scant, painful, irregular)
Kaphaja Artava (white, mucoid, heavy, late, non-foul)
Raktaja Artava (profuse red, hot, clots — Raktapitta)
Kshina Artava (very scanty, pale — Dhatu kshaya)

fields.label: Stri Pathya (Ayurveda regimen advice)
fields.placeholder: Rutumati Paricharya (post-menstrual care: day 1–4 rest + Laghu Ahara), Shatavari Ghrita for Artava kshaya, Ashoka/Lodhra for Asrigdhara, Phala Ghrita for infertility…
